instruction: In /home/user/project_hard, count total lines from all .php files recursively, excluding any path under vendor/ and any file ending with .test.php. Save the exact result as TOTAL=<number> into /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

command: import pyautogui, time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl','alt','t'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command: file_exists='false'; [ -f /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt ] && file_exists='true'; val=$(cat /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt 2>/dev/null); content_ok='false'; [ "$val" = 'TOTAL=9' ] && content_ok='true'; echo "file_exists=$file_exists"; echo "content_ok=$content_ok"
